changes: Purify MP cost reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
Recuperate MP cost reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
Salted Earth healing over time potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Salted Earth damage over time potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Delay until Salt and Darkness becomes usable reduced from 1 to 0.8 seconds.
Salt and Darkness potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Dragon Kick potency increased from 4,500 to 5,500.
Twin Snakes potency increased from 5,000 to 6,000.
Demolish potency increased from 5,500 to 6,500.
Leaping Opo potency increased from 6,500 to 7,000.
Rising Raptor potency increased from 7,000 to 7,500.
Pouncing Coeurl potency increased from 7,500 to 8,000.
Phantom Rush reduction in potency for enemies after the first target has been removed.
Earth's Reply damage potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000 plus 25% of compiled damage.
Earth's Reply cure potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000 plus 50% of compiled damage.
Geirskogul increase to damage suffered caused by Life of the Dragon reduced from 25% to 15%.
Fleeting Raiju Ready effect duration reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Meikyo Shisui effect duration reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Backlash amount of damage dealt absorbed as HP reduced from 100% to 50%.
Encore of Light reduction of target's MP reduced from 5,000 to 4,000.
Maximum HP increased from 57,000 to 58,500.
Scattergun potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Fountain potency increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Fountainfall potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Fan Dance potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Xenoglossy amount of HP absorbed when HP is above 50% reduced from 100% to 50%.
Wreath of Ice reduction to damage taken reduced from 25% to 20%.
Necrotize potency increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Maximum HP reduced from 55,500 to 54,000.
Smudge recast time increased from 12 to 15 seconds.
Miracle of Nature reduction of target's MP reduced from 2,500 to 1,000.
Afflatus Purgation potency reduced from 20,000 to 16,000.
Maximum HP reduced from 55,500 to 54,000.
Celestial River no longer reduces healing potency of nearby enemies by 30%.
Phlegma III potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Psyche potency for enemies more than 3 yalms away increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
